<think> I know that Coelogyne is a genus of orchids, and orchids are a large and diverse family of flowering plants. Daboecia, on the other hand, is a genus of flowering plants in the heath family, and heath families tend to have fewer species compared to orchids. Additionally, I recall that Coelogyne has many species, including Coelogyne cristata, Coelogyne pandurata, and Coelogyne pandurata var. alba, among others. I also know that Daboecia has only a few species, such as Daboecia cantabrica and Daboecia azorica. Therefore, it is likely that Coelogyne has more species than Daboecia. </think>
<answer> Coelogyne </answer>
